startPoint.en: Speak to Darren Lightfinger in his cellar accessed through a trapdoor north of Lumbridge furnace. (via )
startPoint.es: Habla con Darren Lightfinger en su sótano, al que se accede por una trampilla al norte del horno de Lumbridge. (vía)

rewards.name: Craftsman's monocle
rewards.display: Ability to steal a craftsman's monocle

rewards.name: Urist's Crafting Supplies
rewards.display: Ability to purchase crafting equipment from Urist Loric

rewards.name: Pickpocketing volunteer
rewards.display: Access to the pickpocketing volunteers, advanced pickpocketing trainer and coshing volunteers in the Thieves' Guild

rewards.name: Practice chest
rewards.display: Access to the practice chest area in the Thieves' Guild

rewards.name: Thieves' Guild II
rewards.display: Thieves' Guild II - when entering the Thieves' Guild after completion

text.en: Talk to Darren Lightfinger in the Thieves' Guild.
text.es: Habla con Darren Lightfinger en el Thieves' Guild.

text.en: Talk to the market guard in Varrock Square.
text.es: Habla con el guardia del mercado en Varrock Square.

chatOptions: 1 Do you know what he's working on?

text.en: Pickpocket Urist Loric until successful. He is the dwarf just north east of the Varrock General Store.
text.es: Roba a Urist Loric hasta conseguirlo. Es el enano que está justo al noreste de la Varrock General Store.

text.en: Left click to put-down Urist's talisman.
text.es: Haz clic izquierdo para soltar el talismán de Urist.

text.en: To steal from the crafting stall, follow these steps quickly:
text.es: Para robar en el puesto de artesanía, sigue estos pasos rápidamente:
Habla de nuevo con Urist Loric.

text.en: Run to the guard and right-click to distract him.
text.es: Corre hacia el guardia y haz clic derecho para distraerlo.
Roba en el puesto de artesanía.

text.en: Talk to Urist Loric for the banker's note.
text.es: Habla con Urist Loric para conseguir el pagaré del banco.

text.en: Go back to the Thieves' Guild
Use the banker's note on Darren with the toy dragon in the backpack.
text.es: Usa el pagaré del banco en Darren, con el dragón de juguete en la mochila.
